title: Kernel lane 3 / simulate live proof feasibility. In /Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration and /Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard, inspect what would be required to run a true GitHub Actions live proof for kernel-task-completion-backup now. Determine whether local commands, credentials, o...
summary_text: Feasibility is **yes** for a true live proof, with two components: - `agent-orchestration` supplies the workflow endpoint/validation (`kernel-task-completion-backup`) and durable mirror/receipt contract. - [agent-orchestration/.github/workflows/kernel-task-completion-backup.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/.github/workflows/kernel-task-completion-backup.yml) - `codex-kernel-guard` supplies the local runner that dispatches and reconciles to that workflow. - [tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py) - [agent-orchestration/scripts/local/run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/local/run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh) ## What is required 1) Local commands - `python3`, `bash` - `gh` CLI available - optional local tooling used by the wrapper (none beyond standard shell/Python libs) - write access to `/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/state` (default state/journal/db location) 2) Credentials - `gh` must be authenticated for `cursorvers/fugue-orchestrator` with dispatch + contents access. - Practically: `repo` scope (and Actions dispatch ability). - Without auth, dispatch path fails with errors like `gh auth missing`. 3) Network/escalation - Network to GitHub is required for live dispatch/reconcile (`gh workflow run`, `gh api`). - No local shell escalation (`sudo`, etc.) is required. ## Exact end-to-end command path (recommended) Use `run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh` for a realistic path that performs: - local record creation - dispatch attempt - immediate reconcile attempts (with bounded backoff retries) ```bash export GHA_REPO="cursorvers/fugue-orchestrator" export GHA_WORKFLOW="kernel-task-completion-backup.yml" export GHA_DISPATCH_MODE="auto" export TOOLS_ROOT="/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard" export STATE_ROOT="/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/state" cd /Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration bash scripts/local/run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh \ --assistant codex \ --source kernel-explicit \ --session-id "kernel-live-proof-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)" \ --summary "Kernel live proof smoke" \ --title "kernel-task-completion-live-proof" \ --cwd /Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration ``` Then verify dispatch/reconcile state and remote mirror/receipt: ```bash # Inspect local state sqlite3 /Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/state/task-completion-backup.sqlite3 \ "SELECT record_id, gha_dispatch_status, gha_reconcile_status, gha_dispatch_token, gha_mirror_path, gha_receipt_path FROM task_completion_records ORDER BY rowid DESC LIMIT 1;" # Re-run reconciliation if needed python3 -m codex_kernel_guard.cli backup-scan \ --index-db /Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/state/task-completion-backup.sqlite3 \ --journal-path /Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/state/task-completion-journal.jsonl \ --gha-dispatch-mode auto \ --max-dispatch-batch 1 # Validate remote artifacts/repro RECORD_ID=<from DB> TOKEN=<from DB or path parsing> gh api repos/cursorvers/fugue-orchestrator/contents/backups/task-completion/${RECORD_ID}/${TOKEN}.json?ref=kernel-task-completion-backups gh api repos/cursorvers/fugue-orchestrator/contents/backups/task-completion-receipts/${RECORD_ID}/${TOKEN}.json?ref=kernel-task-completion-backups ``` This sequence exercises both dispatch and reconcile; `reconcile_verified_backups` only marks `verified` when both mirror payload and receipt match and include provenance (`run_id` / `run_attempt`).
